name: Sweet Noodle Kugel
recipeIngredient: 1 lb broad noodles, cooked and drained
4 oz dried apricots or peaches, diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 9 by 13 inch pan.
2. Combine all ingredients except cinnamon sugar in a large bowl.
3. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan.
4. Sprinkle with cinnamon sugar.
5. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
